executives.name: Bryn Jones
executives.background: Mr. Jones is an industrial chemist with over 20 years’ experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium. He is also a director of several other ASX-listed companies.

executives.name: Cliff Lawrenson
executives.background: Mr Lawrenson has over 30 years’ experience in the resources and energy sectors. He has held senior executive and board positions with several ASX-listed companies, including Atlas Iron, Ferrum Crescent and GR Engineering Services. He is currently the Non-Executive Chairman of several other ASX-listed companies.
